code: const STORAGE_KEY='olympusrp.roleplayTheme.primary';const DEFAULT_PRIMARY='#0d6091';const clamp=(value,min,max)=>Math.min(Math.max(value,min),max);const normalizeHex=value=>{const input=(value!==null&&value!==void 0?value:'').trim();if(!input)return DEFAULT_PRIMARY;const normalized=input.startsWith('#')?input.slice(1):input;if(/^[0-9a-fA-F]{3}$/.test(normalized)){const[r,g,b]=normalized.split('');return`#${r}${r}${g}${g}${b}${b}`.toUpperCase();}if(/^[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(normalized)){return`#${normalized}`.toUpperCase();}return DEFAULT_PRIMARY;};const hexToRgb=hex=>{const normalized=normalizeHex(hex).slice(1);return{r:parseInt(normalized.slice(0,2),16),g:parseInt(normalized.slice(2,4),16),b:parseInt(normalized.slice(4,6),16)};};const rgbToHex=(r,g,b)=>{const toHex=channel=>clamp(Math.round(channel),0,255).toString(16).padStart(2,'0').toUpperCase();return`#${toHex(r)}${toHex(g)}${toHex(b)}`;};const mixWith=(hex,mixHex,amount)=>{const color=hexToRgb(hex);const mix=hexToRgb(mixHex);const alpha=clamp(amount,0,1);return rgbToHex(color.r+(mix.r-color.r)*alpha,color.g+(mix.g-color.g)*alpha,color.b+(mix.b-color.b)*alpha);};export const getRoleplayThemePrimary=()=>normalizeHex(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY));export const getRoleplayThemePalette=function(){let primary=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:getRoleplayThemePrimary();const base=normalizeHex(primary);return{primary:base,primarySoft:mixWith(base,'#FFFFFF',0.12),primaryBorder:mixWith(base,'#FFFFFF',0.22),primaryStrong:mixWith(base,'#000000',0.18),surface:mixWith(base,'#000000',0.28),surfaceAlt:mixWith(base,'#000000',0.38),highlight:mixWith(base,'#FFFFFF',0.3),text:'#FFFFFF'};};export const applyRoleplayTheme=function(){let primary=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:getRoleplayThemePrimary();const palette=getRoleplayThemePalette(primary);const root=document.documentElement;root.style.setProperty('--rp-primary',palette.primary);root.style.setProperty('--rp-primary-soft',palette.primarySoft);root.style.setProperty('--rp-primary-border',palette.primaryBorder);root.style.setProperty('--rp-primary-strong',palette.primaryStrong);root.style.setProperty('--rp-surface',palette.surface);root.style.setProperty('--rp-surface-alt',palette.surfaceAlt);root.style.setProperty('--rp-highlight',palette.highlight);root.style.setProperty('--rp-text',palette.text);return palette;};export const saveRoleplayTheme=primary=>{const normalized=normalizeHex(primary);localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,normalized);applyRoleplayTheme(normalized);return normalized;};export const resetRoleplayTheme=()=>{localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);return applyRoleplayTheme(DEFAULT_PRIMARY);};export const ROLEPLAY_THEME_DEFAULT=DEFAULT_PRIMARY;
